interface.name: LM_CreateOrUpdateLeaveType
interface.description: Form interface for creating or updating LM Leave Types as an action
interface.definition: a!localVariables( local!recordCopy: a!refreshVariable( value: ri!leaveType, refreshOnReferencedVarChange: false ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_wizardLayout"( titleBar: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_headerTemplateFull"( title: if( ri!isUpdate, "Manage Leave Types", "Manage Leave Types" ), secondaryText: if( ri!isUpdate, "Administrative form for HR to create and configure leave types", "Administrative form for HR to create and configure leave types" ) ), isTitleBarFixed: true, showButtonDivider: true, backgroundColor: "#F6F7F9", steps: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_wizardStep"( label: "Details", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_textField"( label: namedTypedValue.name: isUpdate
namedTypedValue.description: Tracks whether this form is being used to create a new record or update an existing one
